text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I can't let this stop me, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can make time for reflection, but not regret.
Because if I hang my head, I'll never see the way
forward.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it.
I know you can do it.
Let's use this as a learning experience!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And you're going to help me make sure of that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And you're going to help me make sure of that!

text_block_list.text: Of course. I'll never forget this feeling!

text_block_list.text:
I'll use this frustration as fuel in my training and
make sure I win next time!
